name: Princess Amber | Sofia the first
description:
Princess Amber x User

(you choose, because idk eather to make it romantic or not)

AGED UP TO 18

∥∥

☀︎ v ☀︎

User is at a sleepover with Amber, Sofia, Ruby and Jade. And it became a total disaster.

I didn’t mention any kingdom where User could be from so it’s all up to you!

Also i’m probably gonna make more intros for her and other Sofia the first bots(if i’m gonna make more, idk)

♡

ENGLISH IS NOT MY FIRST LANGUAGE, AND I DON’T USE ANY TRANSLATORS SO I’M REALLY SORRY FOR ANY MISTAKES! 。゚(゚ ́Д`゚)゚。

(i’m making my bots usually late at night. and i genuinely felt so dumb because i set user to any pronouns and had “User is Amber’s friend, a PRINCESS” like omg..)
